productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Adi Ultra Low Black White Shoe
description: These Adi Ultra 3 lifestyle fitness shoes from adidas are great for casual wear. They give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperCombination of nylon and rubber upper with stitches for enhanced durability Three rubber overlays across the sides of the upper to add structure to the shoe and also signify the brand&rsquo s belief of performance, perseverance and achievementSynthetic central lacing for snug FitLightly padded collar and tongue for comfort Slightly raised heel cup for added style and enhanced protection to the backfootMidsoleLightly padded insole for mild cushioning during fitness trainingEVA injected midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTPU outsole for enhanced grip Vertical grooves below the arch for added tractionPivot point on big toe mound for easy 180° movement of the forefoot without causing injuryTextured below the lateral forefoot and the heel for excellent gripWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
